glosses.ja: 迂回する; 回避する

sentences.target: Je contourne la flaque devant la porte.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɔ̃tuʁn la flak dəvɑ̃ la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Je contourne la flaque devant la porte.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɔ̃tuʁn la flak dəvɑ̃ la pɔʁt/
translations.en: I'm going around the puddle by the door.
translations.es: Rodeo el charco frente a la puerta.
translations.de: Ich gehe um die Pfütze vor der Tür herum.
translations.it: Aggiro la pozzanghera davanti alla porta.
translations.pt: Eu contorno a poça em frente à porta.
translations.he: אני עוקף את השלולית ליד הדלת.
translations.vi: Tôi đi vòng qua vũng nước trước cửa.
translations.nl: Ik loop om de plas bij de deur heen.
translations.hu: Kikerülöm a tócsát az ajtó előtt.
translations.hi: मैं दरवाज़े के पास वाले पानी के गड्ढे को घूमकर निकलता हूँ.
translations.el: Περνάω γύρω από τη λακκούβα μπροστά στην πόρτα.
translations.nb: Jeg går rundt pytten foran døren.
translations.id: Aku berjalan mengitari genangan di depan pintu.
translations.sv: Jag går runt pölen vid dörren.
translations.da: Jeg går uden om vandpytten ved døren.
translations.ja: ドアの前の水たまりを避けて通る。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular) serving as the clause's subject.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular), transitive; denotes the action of skirting/bypassing.
Definite article (feminine singular) introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun (feminine); head of the direct object noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a locative PP that modifies 'flaque' (post-nominal location).
Definite article (feminine singular) within the prepositional phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: On contourne le parc par la petite rue.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ kɔ̃tuʁn lə paʁk paʁ la pətit ʁy/

translations.fr: On contourne le parc par la petite rue.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ kɔ̃tuʁn lə paʁk paʁ la pətit ʁy/
translations.en: We go around the park via the small street.
translations.es: Rodeamos el parque por la calle pequeña.
translations.de: Wir gehen über die kleine Straße um den Park herum.
translations.it: Giriamo intorno al parco passando per la stradina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们沿着小路绕过公园。
translations.yue: 我哋經條小路繞過公園。
translations.ru: Мы обходим парк по маленькой улице.
translations.pt: Contornamos o parque pela rua pequena.
translations.he: אנחנו עוקפים את הפארק דרך הרחוב הקטן.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi vòng quanh công viên bằng con đường nhỏ.
translations.ar: نلتف حول الحديقة عبر الشارع الصغير.
translations.nl: We lopen om het park heen via het kleine straatje.
translations.hu: A kis utcán keresztül kerüljük meg a parkot.
translations.hi: हम छोटी गली से पार्क के चारों ओर जाते हैं.
translations.el: Πάμε γύρω από το πάρκο μέσω του μικρού δρόμου.
translations.nb: Vi går rundt parken via den lille gata.
translations.id: Kami mengitari taman lewat jalan kecil.
translations.sv: Vi går runt parken via den lilla gatan.
translations.da: Vi går rundt om parken via den lille gade.
translations.ja: 小さな通りを通って公園の周りを回る。

tokens.explanation: Generic subject pronoun; syntactic subject triggering 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular with 'on'); transitive, taking a direct object.
Definite article (masculine singular) introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a PP expressing route/means.
Definite article (feminine singular) within the prepositional phrase.
Adjective (feminine singular) pre-nominally modifying 'rue'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'par'.

translations.de: Du gehst um die Menschenmenge herum.
translations.vi: Bạn đi vòng qua đám đông.
translations.nl: Je loopt om de menigte heen.
translations.hi: तुम भीड़ को घूमकर पार करते हो.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person singular) serving as the clause's subject.
Main verb, present indicative (2nd person singular), transitive.
Definite article (feminine singular) introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun; head of the direct object noun phrase.

sentences.target: On peut contourner la file par là.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pø kɔ̃tuʁne la fil paʁ la/

translations.fr: On peut contourner la file par là.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pø kɔ̃tuʁne la fil paʁ la/
translations.en: We can go around the line that way.
translations.es: Podemos rodear la cola por ahí.
translations.de: Wir können die Schlange dort umgehen.
translations.it: Possiamo aggirare la fila da quella parte.
translations.ko: 저쪽으로 줄을 피해 갈 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们可以从那边绕过队伍。
translations.yue: 我哋可以喺嗰邊繞過條隊。
translations.pt: Podemos contornar a fila por ali.
translations.vi: Chúng ta có thể đi vòng qua hàng người ở lối đó.
translations.nl: We kunnen daar om de rij heen gaan.
translations.hu: Arra meg lehet kerülni a sort.
translations.hi: हम उस तरफ से कतार को घूमकर पार कर सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορούμε να παρακάμψουμε την ουρά από εκεί.
translations.nb: Vi kan gå rundt køen der.
translations.id: Kita bisa mengitari antrean lewat sana.
translations.sv: Vi kan gå runt kön där.
translations.da: Vi kan gå uden om køen derovre.
translations.ja: あっちから列を迂回できる。

tokens.explanation: Generic subject pronoun; syntactic subject (3rd person singular agreement).
Modal auxiliary, present indicative (3rd person singular), expressing ability/possibility; selects an infinitive.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of the modal auxiliary.
Definite article (feminine singular) introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a PP expressing route.
Deictic adverb serving as the complement of the preposition 'par' (indicates the path/location: 'that way').
